title: astracantha spiciformis
intro: Astracantha spiciformis, also known as the spiny astragalus, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astracantha spiciformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or dried extract, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis and coughs.
